metadata.description: Official marketplace for Fynla financial planning application — skills, agents, and tools for the development team

plugins.name: fynla-dev-skills
plugins.description: Core development skills: session management (start/end), systematic debugging, feature scaffolding, tech debt auditing, deployment notes/checklists, shipping (commit/push/PR), cost estimation, and skill creation.

plugins.name: fynla-compliance
plugins.description: UK tax compliance and security review agents — HMRC tax calculation verification and financial data security auditing

plugins.name: fynla-design
plugins.description: Premium UI design and UX writing agents — elevate interfaces and craft user-centred microcopy

plugins.name: fynla-ops
plugins.description: Operations agents: Laravel deployment, MySQL optimisation, and product management

plugins.name: fynla-windows
plugins.description: Windows-compatible development skills for Fynla. PowerShell equivalents of session management, deployment notes, tech debt auditing, and cost estimation — with port management, Windows path conventions, and dev.ps1 integration.
